name: White Bishop
ability: You start knowing the length of the longest line of Townsfolk.
flavor: Faith is a simple thing. Tending to the wounded. Comforting the bereft. Our Faith makes all of us stronger.
firstNightReminder: Show a number to the White Bishop.

name: Midwife
ability: You start knowing 2 players: one is a Minion (if possible), the other is an Outsider (if possible).
flavor: At birth I could barely tell them apart. Interesting to see how different they've grown.

name: Templar
ability: You start knowing an in-play Minion. Your Townsfolk neighbors are safe from Minions' & Outsiders' abilities.
flavor: Stand behind me. Faith holds us together.
firstNightReminder: Show the Templar an in-play Minion token.

name: Guardian Angel
ability: You start knowing a good player. If they die at night, you may die instead. If you don't, you learn the ability that killed them.
flavor: Your time hasn't come yet!
firstNightReminder: Show a good player to the Guardian Angel.

name: Palm Reader
ability: Each night, choose a player: if they are good, you learn their character. Otherwise, you learn arbitrary information.
flavor: Every line tells a story. Let me see yours.
firstNightReminder: The Palm Reader chooses a player.
otherNightReminder: The Palm Reader chooses a player.

name: Psychopomp
ability: Each night*, you learn a character that was killed by the Demon tonight.
flavor: The dead whisper. Such anguish. Such hatred. Let me speak for them, so that they may finally be at peace.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Psychopomp and show them a character token, or shake your head "No".

name: Dhampir
ability: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: if correct, they die.
flavor: Be at ease. If your heart is pure, you have nothing to fear.
otherNightReminder: The Dhampir guesses a player's character.

name: Blood Artist
ability: Once per day, if you nominated and executed a living player yesterday, privately ask the Storyteller any yes/no question
flavor: Every pigment pales in comparison to working with real materials.

name: Hedge Witch
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a good character. Other players that are this character cannot die while you live.
flavor: This talisman will ward off evil spirits. Keep it with you at all time.
firstNightReminder: If the Hedge Witch has their ability, they may point to a character on their character sheet.
otherNightReminder: If the Hedge Witch has their ability, they may point to a character on their character sheet.

name: Inquisitor
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: if they are a Minion, they die. If they are the Demon, you die.
flavor: I will purge this world by Holy Fire!
otherNightReminder: The Inquisitor may point to a player. If they do, put the no ability reminder.

name: Soulcatcher
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: you learn and gain their ability. If they are evil, you are poisoned.
flavor: Lend me your power and let me avenge your death!
otherNightReminder: If the Soulcatcher still has his ability, they may point to a dead player. If they have another's player ability, wake them when that player would wake.

name: Confessor
ability: On your first night, choose any number X of players. On night X, you learn how many are evil.
flavor: Repent and you shall be saved.
firstNightReminder: The Confessor points at any number of players. Mark them with the "Confessed" reminder.
otherNightReminder: If it is night X, where X is the number of "Confessed" reminders, wake the Confessor and tell them how many are Evil.

name: Medium
ability: On your first day, you may visit the Storyteller to learn a prediction. When it occurs, you learn this tonight.
flavor: Dreams show me a door of seven locks. Six undone, one unformed. The seventh seal awaits the final key. The gate stirs. Its opening nears.
otherNightReminder: If the Prophecy has come to pass, wake the Medium, tell them "yes", then put them to sleep.

name: Madman
ability: You think you are a Townsfolk. You have the ability of the character you believe to be. Townsfolk abilities yield false information.
flavor: Don't listen to him. His words will poison your mind.

name: Cursed
ability: You believe you are a Townsfolk. You have the ability of the character you believe to be. You might register as any character and any aligment, even if dead.
flavor: What have I done to deserve your doubts?

name: Coward
ability: When you learn that you died, name any number of living players. If you don't name at least 1 good & 1 evil, your team loses. Named Townsfolk are drunk until dawn.
flavor: The monsters are everywhere! Everywhere!

name: Sacrificial Lamb
ability: If the Demon dying would end the game & 5 or more players live, you swap character and alignment with the Demon. (Travellers don't count)
flavor: Bring the virgin sacrifice. The Dark Lord will return!
otherNightReminder: If the Sacrificial Lamb became the Demon, wake them, show them their new character and their new alignment. Do the same with the former Demon.

name: Devotee
ability: You think you are a Minion. You think other Devotees are Minions & that the Black Bishop is a Demon. [the Black Bishop is in play]
flavor: We live to serve.

name: Vampire
ability: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: if correct, they die.
flavor: May I come in?
otherNightReminder: The Vampire guesses a player's character.

name: Black Bishop
ability: You know who the Devotees are & what Demon they believe you to be. Evil players might register as Devotees to other Devotees and to you. [+1 to +3 Devotees]
flavor: Your faith will be rewarded. Glory to the Dark Lord.
firstNightReminder: Simulate a Demon info and Minion info phase for the Black Bishop and his Devotees.

name: Vengeful Spirit
ability: The 1st time you die by execution, you live but register as dead. From now on, each night, choose a player: they die.
flavor: My curse upon you!
otherNightReminder: If the Vengeful Spirit has the "Awakened" reminder, they choose a player to kill.

name: Succubus
ability: Townsfolk that nominate you or are nominated by you become Cursed. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.
flavor: You won't hurt me, will you? Haven't I been a... good friend?

name: Werewolf
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Once per game, at night, you may choose twice.
flavor: Awooooo!
otherNightReminder: The Werewolf points at one player. If they still have their ability, offer them to choose another player.

name: The Dark Lord
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. One Minion has an Outsider ability in addition to their own ability. They know which and they still know they are a Minion.
flavor: Rise, my Minions! Rise and obey your true Master!
firstNightReminder: Wake a Minion of your choice and show them their Outsider ability.
otherNightReminder: The Dark Lord chooses a player.

name: Body Stealer
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. When put on the block by a Minion, if 5 or more players live, you switch character with them.
flavor: This one has become useless. Bring me another!
otherNightReminder: The Body Stealer chooses a player.

name: Maiden of Lust
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Once per game, at night, choose a player & a not-in-play Minion: they become evil & that Minion. [-1 Minion, +1 Outsider]
flavor: Would you rather serve in Heavens or rule in Hell?
firstNightReminder: The Maiden of Lust may point to a player to become a Minion of their choice.
otherNightReminder: The Maiden of Lust chooses a player to die. Then, they may point to a player to become a Minion of their choice if they haven't done so yet.

name: Will o' Wisp
ability: Each night*, choose a player you haven't chosen yet. They wake and may accept your guidance. If they do, that night, they either die or cannot die and play twice, your choice.
flavor: Witches would have you believe they are helpful spirits, guiding travelers through the glades. Do not be fools! These abominations will only lead you to your death. Mark my word!
otherNightReminder: The Will o' Wisp picks a player and chooses guidance or death.

name: Fallen Angel
ability: Each time someone is executed, you may choose to die instead. If you do, that night, you learn their character.
flavor: What could cause such a pure being to lose her light?
otherNightReminder: If the Angel sacrificed themselves, they learn a character.

name: Gatekeeper
ability: Dead players may publicly sacrifice their vote token. If they do so, they regain their ability until dusk tomorrow. You secretly decide if they are drunk.
flavor: You have spoken the words and offered payment. You shall pass. Return before the sun sets tomorrow, lest you be trapped forever in the worlds between.

name: The Night
ability: At the start of each day, before night death are announced, you may silently point at someone. Everyone may vote. If a majority is reached, the designated player dies.
flavor: Primal. Uncaring. Cold. Just.
